conditions.condition: CLI remains a devmasterd API client
conditions.evidence: The proposal forbids direct queue, state, evidence, cost, ratchet, provider, or authorization ownership by the CLI.

conditions.condition: CLI scope is limited to localhost status, evidence, intake, and smoke commands
conditions.evidence: scope_in is limited to local daemon HTTP API operations and local provider fixtures.
The proposal requires DEVMASTERD_TOKEN or explicit test-only smoke input and forbids token persistence in logs, evidence, or state.

conditions.condition: Web, IDE, real provider, external repo, deploy, PR, and production side effects stay out of scope
conditions.evidence: scope_out explicitly forbids each surface and side effect class.
The proposal requires a CLI smoke command against localhost devmasterd and local provider fixtures only.

recommendation: Gate K passes. Implement only the Phase 8 CLI local client slice, then run Gate L on generated CLI smoke evidence.
